And so you say that these people are representative of the entire class and therefore whatever compensation the representatives get should be given to the entire class and what Erin Brockovich has done is she's gone out and she's gotten declarations from 600 people saying that they were harmed and so effectively they have 600 people representing the class and that's important because defense attorneys try to defeat a class by showing that class representatives don't represent the class or their claims are unusual or there are a whole number of reasons why you would defeat a class action by disqualifying one or two class members and often class actions only have a single class member or
